prompt: Atmospheric slow-motion shot of heavy rain falling on a neon-lit Tokyo street at midnight, puddles reflecting glowing signage in Japanese. A lone figure with a transparent umbrella crosses the frame, Steadicam follow shot at eye level, anamorphic lens streaks from neon lights, moody cyberpunk color grade with magenta and electric blue.
winner_reason: Highest quality (90) with exceptional rain and neon reflection detail
